## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Tavrn and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy, progress, and analytics.](https://fathom.video/share/v_Kch5xA2yzWzGGrk_GnqftMj3GWFfcQ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production ramping up to 5 articles/week; focus shifting to include medical record retrieval content](https://fathom.video/share/v_Kch5xA2yzWzGGrk_GnqftMj3GWFfcQ?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
  - [New LookerDash analytics setup provides comprehensive insights on website performance and content effectiveness](https://fathom.video/share/v_Kch5xA2yzWzGGrk_GnqftMj3GWFfcQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1031.0)
  - [Case studies being developed internally by Tavrn; will be incorporated into blog and used as CTAs](https://fathom.video/share/v_Kch5xA2yzWzGGrk_GnqftMj3GWFfcQ?tab=summary&timestamp=745.0)

## Topics

### Team Introductions and Roles

  - [Kellie Geisel primary point of contact for Tavrn, handling business ops and content review](https://fathom.video/share/v_Kch5xA2yzWzGGrk_GnqftMj3GWFfcQ?tab=summary&timestamp=117.0)

### Content Production and Strategy
